payload.label: mirror
payload.long_description: Wall-mounted rectangular frameless mirror with a glossy reflective surface, vertically oriented and partially cropped by the image edges; it reflects a tripod and a door, shows noticeable digital reconstruction/warping artifacts, and appears roughly 2.0 meters from the camera.

message.content:
{
  "label": "mirror",
  "short_description": "rectangular frameless wall mirror, partial",
  "long_description": "Wall-mounted rectangular frameless mirror with a glossy reflective surface, vertically oriented and partially cropped by the image edges; it reflects a tripod and a door, shows noticeable digital reconstruction/warping artifacts, and appears roughly 2.0 meters from the camera.",
  "attributes": [
    "rectangular",
    "frameless / thin frame",
    "vertical orientation",
    "partially cropped / edge-cut",
    "reflective surface",
    "tripod reflection visible",
    "digital reconstruction artifacts / warping",
    "medium size (~60–90 cm tall)",
    "wall-mounted"
  ],
  "distance_from_camera_m": 2.0
}
